data.text/markdown:
Uplift policy explorer

The posterior over each customer's effect is fit once. The sliders below only re-derive the decision — so they respond instantly. Move them and watch who we'd target, how much we'd make, and what the remaining uncertainty is worth.

console.name: stderr
console.text:
Multiprocess sampling (2 chains in 2 jobs)
CompoundStep
>CompoundStep
>>PGBART: [prog]
>>PGBART: [tau]
>NUTS: [sd]
Sampling 2 chains for 200 tune and 200 draw iterations (400 + 400 draws total) took 9 seconds.

data.text/markdown:
Decision at cost €8

quantity value
customers targeted 243 / 1000 (top 28% by rank)
profit at optimal stop €2,902
value of information (total) €345
…on the 619 "straddlers" €337
The straddlers — whose interval crosses the cost line — are exactly the customers to put into an A/B test rather than mail blind.
